scripts.dev:full: docker-compose up -d postgres && wait-on tcp:5432 && npm run --workspace=apps/backend db:seed -- --skip-if-seeded 2>/dev/null; concurrently --names "API,WORKER,FRONTEND,WEBHOOK,DEMO,AGENT" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan,green,magenta,yellow,white" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/backend" "npm run worker --workspace=apps/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/frontend" "npm run mock-webhook --workspace=apps/backend" "npm run demo-app --workspace=apps/backend" "npm run agent-runner --workspace=apps/backend -- ../../watchdog-agent.config.json"
